title: IMPv2 Domain Model v1
description: Domain definitions for IMPv2 (live animals) import notifications. Extends imports-common-v1 with animal-specific types. Structurally compatible with DEFRA/ipaffs-imports-notification-schema, curated for the published event contract.

AnimalCertification.description: Certification for animal. Compatible with ipaffs-imports-notification-schema AnimalCertification.
enum: Commercial sale or change of ownership
Personally owned pets not for rehoming

VeterinaryInformation.description: Veterinary checks and document details for live animal imports

establishmentsOfOrigin.description: List of approved establishments which issued veterinary documents

accompanyingDocuments.description: Accompanying documents valid for live animal imports. Uses allOf to inherit common AccompanyingDocument structure while restricting documentType enum to only animal-relevant types (veterinary certificates, transport documents, etc). This provides schema-level type safety without requiring the common layer to pre-categorize document types by journey.

documentType.description: Document types valid for live animal imports (IMPv2, CVEDA). Subset of common DocumentType enum.

Commodities.description: Commodities for live animal imports. Extends common Commodities with animal-specific certification.
